Description.description: Operational error record written by plugin, flow, portal, or external API handling.
Correlation identifier shared by related plugin, flow, portal, or API operations.
Detailed exception, payload, or troubleshooting context.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Power Automate flow run identifier for automation failures.
Short error message or business failure summary.
Short label for an integration, automation, portal, or plugin error event.
Operation being performed when the error occurred.
Whether the failed operation may be safely retried.
Whether the failed operation may be safely retried.
Related service request, when the error is request-specific.
Component that reported the error.
Component that reported the error.
Review status of the logged error.
Review status of the logged error.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Unique identifier for the organization
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Status of the Integration/Error Log
Status of the Integration/Error Log
Reason for the status of the Integration/Error Log
Reason for the status of the Integration/Error Log
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
